query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.email, p.status, p.createdAt,
       i.id as invite_id, i.token, i.email as invite_email, i.createdAt as invite_created, i.expiresAt, i.usedAt
FROM prospects p
LEFT JOIN agent_invites i ON i.email = p.email
WHERE p.email = 'lulusharris@yahoo.com'
ORDER BY i.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
